t.token_address,
s.type,
s.symbol,

 as total_usd_value

from (select * from DBT.BBOUALEM.stg_token_transfers where false limit 0) t

where s.contract_address is not null

t.date,
s.type,


sum( t.value/power(10, s.decimals ) )

 as total_usd_value

on t.token_address = s.contract_address

where s.contract_address is not null

group by 
t.date,
s.type

t.date,
t.token_address,


sum( t.value/power(10, 6 ) )

 as total_value

from (select * from DBT.BBOUALEM.stg_token_transfers where false limit 0) t 

where lower(t.token_address) = '0x50327c6c5a14DCaDE707ABad2E27eB517df87AB5'

group by 
t.date,
t.token_address

results.message:
Database Error in model stg_transactions_enriched (models\staging\analytics\stg_transactions_enriched.sql)
  001003 (42000): SQL compilation error:
  syntax error line 55 at position 0 unexpected 'select'.
results.compiled_code:
WITH token_transfer_aggs AS (

select
transaction_hash,
count(*) as token_transfer_count
from (select * from DBT.BBOUALEM.stg_token_transfers where false limit 0)
group by transaction_hash

),

transactions_enriched AS (


select

t.hash,
t.block_number,
t.date,
t.from_address,
t.to_address,
t.value,
t.receipt_contract_address,
t.input,
tt.token_transfer_count,
1 as new_field,

case
    when t.receipt_contract_address != '' then 'contract_creation'
    when tt.transaction_hash is not null then 'token_transfer'
    when t.input = '0x' and t.value > 0 then 'plain_eth_transfer'
    else 'other'
end as transaction_category

from (select * from DBT.BBOUALEM.stg_transactions where false limit 0) t

left join token_transfer_aggs tt

on t.hash = tt.transaction_hash




where date >= (select max(date) from DBT.BBOUALEM.stg_transactions_enriched )



)
,
select
*
from transactions_enriched

select 
*
from (select * from DBT.BBOUALEM_marts.stablecoin_activity_per_day_v2 where false limit 0)
where 
type = 'Fiat-Backed'
